ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Flight 1234 (Booking Ref: ABC123)
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Below are your flight details:

- Flight: SH1234
- Date: 2026-05-15
- Departure: JFK Airport, 09:30 AM
- Arrival: LHR Airport, 09:45 PM (local time)
- Seat: 12A (Window)
- Class: Business

Baggage Allowance:
- 1 carry‑on (23kg)
- 1 checked bag (32kg)

Please arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before departure. For any changes to your itinerary, visit <URL> or contact our support.

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh. We wish you a pleasant journey.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Award Notification – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient of the prestigious XYZ University International Scholarship Fund.

To secure your scholarship award, please complete the following steps within the next 24 hours:

1. Verify your personal details by clicking the secure link below.
2. Upload the required documents (passport copy, academic transcripts, and a recent photograph).
3. Pay the administrative fee of $75.00 via the verified payment portal.

Failure to complete these steps promptly will result in forfeiture of the award.

Secure Link: <URL>

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Office of International Scholarships
XYZ University

Note: This email is sent from a monitored address. Please do not reply directly; instead, use the link provided.
